attributes.description: This dashboard provides insights into the credits and billing data for ESS.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

embeddableConfig.description: Run rate (ECUs per day) computed as average of the last 7 days of the filtered time period

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tend - 7 days
| STATS
  total_ECUs_period = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu),
  count_days_period = COUNT_DISTINCT(DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp))
| EVAL recent_run_rate = total_ECUs_period / count_days_period
| KEEP recent_run_rate

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| STATS
  current_balance = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_balance),
  total_quantity = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_quantity)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| STATS
  current_balance = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_balance),
  total_quantity = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_quantity)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| STATS
  current_balance = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_balance),
  total_quantity = SUM(ess.billing.ecu_quantity)

{"%timefilter%": "min"}, "max": {"%timefilter%": "max"}}}, "aggs": {"credit_use": {"sum": {"field": "ess.billing.total_ecu"}}}}}}}, "format": {"property": "aggregations.daily_breakdown.buckets"}, "transform": [{"type": "project", "fields": ["key_as_string", "credit_use.value"], "as": ["timestamp", "credit_use"]}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "utcParse(datum.timestamp, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%LZ')", "as": "timestamp"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "data('credits')[0]", "as": "credits"}, {"type": "project", "fields": ["credits.timestamp", "credits.start", "credits.end", "credits.ecu_balance", "credits.ecu_quantity", "timestamp", "credit_use"], "as": ["credit_measure_timestamp", "credit_start", "credit_end", "credit_balance", "credit_quantity", "timestamp", "credit_use"]}]}, {"name": "billing_pre_credits", "source": "billing_data", "transform": [{"type": "filter", "expr": "datum.timestamp < datum.credit_measure_timestamp"}, {"type": "window", "sort": {"field": "timestamp", "order": "descending"}, "fields": ["credit_use"], "ops": ["sum"], "as": ["cumulative_credit_use"]}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "datum.cumulative_credit_use + datum.credit_balance", "as": "ecu_balance"}]}, {"name": "billing_post_credits", "source": "billing_data", "transform": [{"type": "filter", "expr": "datum.timestamp >= datum.credit_measure_timestamp"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "datum.timestamp - datum.credit_measure_timestamp == 0 ? 0 : datum.credit_use", "as": "credit_use"}, {"type": "window", "sort": {"field": "timestamp", "order": "ascending"}, "fields": ["credit_use"], "ops": ["sum"], "as": ["cumulative_credit_use"]}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "datum.credit_balance - datum.cumulative_credit_use", "as": "ecu_balance"}]}, {"name": "historical_billing", "source": ["billing_pre_credits", "billing_post_credits"], "transform": [{"type": "project", "fields": ["timestamp", "ecu_balance"], "as": ["day", "ecu_balance"]}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "'Historical "projection_daily_costs", "url": {"index": "metrics-ess_billing.billing-*", "body": {"size": 0, "query": {"bool": {"must": ["%dashboard_context-must_clause%"], "must_not": ["%dashboard_context-must_not_clause%"], "filter": ["%dashboard_context-filter_clause%", {"range": {"@timestamp": {"gte": "now-31d/d", "lt": "now-1d/d"}}}]}}, "aggs": {"per_day": {"date_histogram": {"field": "@timestamp", "calendar_interval": "day"}, "aggs": {"cost_per_day": {"sum": {"field": "ess.billing.total_ecu"}}}}}}}, "format": {"property": "aggregations.per_day.buckets"}, "transform": "expr": "datum.rank <= lookback_days"}, {"type": "aggregate", "ops": ["average"], "fields": ["cost"], "as": ["avg_daily_cost"]}]}, {"name": "expected_projection", "values": [{}], "transform": [{"type": "formula", "expr": "length(data('projection_avg')) ? data('projection_avg')[0].avg_daily_cost : 0", "as": "quantity"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "data('historical_billing')[0]", "as": "expr": "datum.ecu_balance-datum.cumulative_quantity", "as": "ecu_balance"}, {"type": "project", "fields": ["day", "ecu_balance"]}, {"type": "filter", "expr": "datum.ecu_balance > 0"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "'Expected consumption'", "as": "type"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "utcFormat(datum.day, '%Y-%m-%d')", "as": "key"}]}, {"name": "contractual_projection", "values": [{}], "datum.ecu_balance/((datum.end-datum.last_timestamp)/1000/3600/24)", "as": "quantity"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "timeOffset('day', datum.last_timestamp)", "as": "last_timestamp"}, {"type": "formula", "expr": "utcSequence('day', datum.last_timestamp, datum.end)", "as": "day"}, {"type": "flatten", "fields": ["day"]}, {"type": "window", "fields": ["quantity"], "ops": ["sum"], "as": "expected_projection", "contractual_projection"], "transform": [{"type": "collect", "sort": {"field": "day", "order": "descending"}}]}], "scales": [{"name": "x", "type": "time", "range": "width", "domain": {"data": "aggregated_billing", "field": "day"}}, {"name": "y", "type": "linear", "range": "height", "nice": true, "zero": false, "domain": {"data": "aggregated_billing", "field": "ecu_balance"}}, {"name": "color", "type": "ordinal", "range": "category", "domain": ["Historical consumption", "Expected consumption", "Contractual target"]}], "axes": [{"orient": "bottom", "scale": '#0077CC' : '#98A2B3'"}, "strokeWidth": {"value": 1}}}}, {"type": "text", "name": "btn30txt", "encode": {"enter": {"x": {"value": 271}, "y": {"value": -26}, "align": {"value": "center"}, "text": {"value": "30 days"}, "fontSize": {"value": 11}, "fontWeight": {"value": "500"}, "cursor": {"value": "pointer"}, "tooltip": {"value": "Average consumption over last 30 days"}}, "update": {"fill": {"signal": "lookback_days === 30 ? 0 : 1"}}}}, {"type": "rule", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 0}, "x2": {"scale": "x", "signal": "day", "offset": 0.5}, "y": {"scale": "y", "signal": "contractual_balance", "offset": 0.5}, "stroke": {"scale": "color", "signal": "'Contractual target'"}, "opacity": {"signal": "contractual_balance == null ? 0 : 1"}}}}, {"type": "rule", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"value": 0}, "x2": {"scale": "x", "signal": "day", "offset": 0.5}, "y": {"scale": "y", "signal": "expected_balance", "offset": 0.5}, "stroke": {"scale": "color", "signal": "'Expected consumption'"}, "opacity": {"signal": "expected_balance == null ? 0 : 1"}}}}, {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"scale": "x", "signal": "day"}, "y2": {"field": {"group": "height"}, "offset": 30}, "align": {"value": "center"}, "text": {"signal": "timeFormat(day, '%d %b %Y')"}, "fill": {"value": "#98A2B3"}}}}, {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"offset": -30}, "y": {"scale": "y", "signal": "historical_balance", "offset": 0.5}, "align": {"value": "center"}, "text": {"signal": "format(ceil(historical_balance), ',.0f')"}, "fill": {"scale": "color", "signal": "'Historical consumption'"}, "opacity": {"signal": "historical_balance == null ? 0 : 1"}}}}, {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"offset": -30}, "y": {"scale": "y", "signal": "contractual_balance", "offset": 0.5}, "align": {"value": "center"}, "text": {"signal": "format(ceil(contractual_balance), ',.0f')"}, "fill": {"scale": "color", "signal": "'Contractual target'"}, "opacity": {"signal": "contractual_balance == null ? 0 : 1"}}}}, {"type": "text", "encode": {"update": {"x": {"offset": -30}, "y": {"scale": "y", "signal": "expected_balance", "offset": 0.5}, "align": {"value": "center"}, "text": {"signal": "format(ceil(expected_balance), ',.0f')"}, "fill": {"scale": "color", "signal": "'Expected consumption'"}, "opacity": {"signal": "expected_balance == null ? 0 : 1"}}}}], "legends": [{"fill": "color", "orient": "top-right", "encode": {"title": {"update": {"fontSize": {"value": 14}}}, "labels": {"enter": {"fontSize": {"value": 12}, "fill": {"value": "#98A2B3"}}}, "symbols": {"update": {"stroke": {"value": "transparent"}}}}}], "padding": {"top": 5, "left": 5, "right": 5, "bottom": 5}}

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

FROM metrics-ess_billing.billing-*
| STATS total_ECUs = SUM(ess.billing.total_ecu::DOUBLE) BY month = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 month)

| EVAL month_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM yyyy", month)

params.markdown:
# 🪙 Credits dashboard

Displaying this dashboard correctly requires an existing active commercial commitment with Elastic.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| EVAL
  ess.billing.start = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.start),
  ess.billing.end = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.end)

| KEEP
  ess.billing.ecu_balance,
  ess.billing.ecu_quantity,
  ess.billing.start,
  ess.billing.end

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| EVAL
  ess.billing.start = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.start),
  ess.billing.end = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.end)

| KEEP
  ess.billing.ecu_balance,
  ess.billing.ecu_quantity,
  ess.billing.start,
  ess.billing.end

FROM metrics-ess_billing.credits-*
| WHERE ess.billing.active == true

// Only get the most recent balance
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(@timestamp)
| WHERE @timestamp == latest

| EVAL
  ess.billing.start = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.start),
  ess.billing.end = DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd", ess.billing.end)

| KEEP
  ess.billing.ecu_balance,
  ess.billing.ecu_quantity,
  ess.billing.start,
  ess.billing.end

attributes.title: [Metrics ESS Billing] Credits dashboard
